'''togapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:spaceful|spaceful]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-g-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:spaceful|spaceful]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| togapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:togapithi|togapithi]] || [[word:togapiji|togapiji]] || [[word:togapishi|togapishi]] || [[word:togapiki|togapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:togaputhuthu|togaputhuthu]] || [[word:togapujuju|togapujuju]] || [[word:togapushushu|togapushushu]] || [[word:togapukuku|togapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:togaputhu|togaputhu]] || [[word:togapuju|togapuju]] || [[word:togapushu|togapushu]] || [[word:togapuku|togapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:togapufthuf|togapufthuf]] || [[word:togapufjuf|togapufjuf]] || [[word:togapufshuf|togapufshuf]] || [[word:togapufkuf|togapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:togapethe|togapethe]] || [[word:togapeje|togapeje]] || [[word:togapeshe|togapeshe]] || [[word:togapeke|togapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:togapothotho|togapothotho]] || [[word:togapojojo|togapojojo]] || [[word:togaposhosho|togaposhosho]] || [[word:togapokoko|togapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:togapotho|togapotho]] || [[word:togapojo|togapojo]] || [[word:togaposho|togaposho]] || [[word:togapoko|togapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:togapofthof|togapofthof]] || [[word:togapofjof|togapofjof]] || [[word:togapofshof|togapofshof]] || [[word:togapofkof|togapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:togapÃŸfthÃŸf|togapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:togapÃŸfjÃŸf|togapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:togapÃŸfshÃŸf|togapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:togapÃŸfkÃŸf|togapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:togapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|togapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:togapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|togapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:togapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|togapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:togapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|togapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:togapÃŸfthÃŸf|togapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:togapÃŸfjÃŸf|togapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:togapÃŸfshÃŸf|togapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:togapÃŸfkÃŸf|togapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:togapÃŸfthÃŸf|togapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:togapÃŸfjÃŸf|togapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:togapÃŸfshÃŸf|togapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:togapÃŸfkÃŸf|togapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:togapÃḊthÃḊ|togapÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:togapÃḊjÃḊ|togapÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:togapÃḊshÃḊ|togapÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:togapÃḊkÃḊ|togapÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:togapathatha|togapathatha]] || [[word:togapajaja|togapajaja]] || [[word:togapashasha|togapashasha]] || [[word:togapakaka|togapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:togapatha|togapatha]] || [[word:togapaja|togapaja]] || [[word:togapasha|togapasha]] || [[word:togapaka|togapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:togapafthaf|togapafthaf]] || [[word:togapafjaf|togapafjaf]] || [[word:togapafshaf|togapafshaf]] || [[word:togapafkaf|togapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:togapasha|togapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:togapshÃḋsha|togapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:togaprosha|togaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:togapmusha|togapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:togapyasha|togapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotogapnkshÃḋsha|gotogapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotogapnkrosha|gotogapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotogapnkmusha|gotogapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotogapnkyasha|gotogapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:togagapasha|togagapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:togagapshÃḋsha|togagapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:togagaprosha|togagaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:togagapmusha|togagapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:togagapyasha|togagapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotogagapnkshÃḋsha|gotogagapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotogagapnkrosha|gotogagapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotogagapnkmusha|gotogagapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotogagapnkyasha|gotogagapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tegÃḊpasha|tegÃḊpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tegÃḊpshÃḋsha|tegÃḊpshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tegÃḊprosha|tegÃḊprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tegÃḊpmusha|tegÃḊpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tegÃḊpyasha|tegÃḊpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotegÃḊpnkshÃḋsha|gotegÃḊpnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotegÃḊpnkrosha|gotegÃḊpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotegÃḊpnkmusha|gotegÃḊpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotegÃḊpnkyasha|gotegÃḊpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:togfapasha|togfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:togfapshÃḋsha|togfapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:togfaprosha|togfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:togfapmusha|togfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:togfapyasha|togfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotogfapnkshÃḋsha|gotogfapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotogfapnkrosha|gotogfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotogfapnkmusha|gotogfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotogfapnkyasha|gotogfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
